title: Building Housing Map
section_headers: Map of all Office of Housing projects
content:
## Map of all Office of Housing projects

Explore what we’re building in your area.

Show Map

Welcome to the Mayor's Office of Housing community engagement platform.

## what’s included on the map?

##### Mayor's Office of Housing PROJECTS

The map is a full inventory of projects and parcels managed by the Mayor's Office of Housing.

Can't find your project on the Mayor's Office of Housing map? Search for it on the Boston Planning & Development Agency (BPDA) map.

##### ACTIVE DEVELOPMENT PROJECTS

Browse all active Housing, Open Space, Commercial, and To Be Decided (TBD) projects. Click on a project to view goals, timeline, photos, meetings and more.

##### CITY-OWNED LAND

Browse all inactive Office of Housing land by clicking the small gray dots.

##### LAND FOR SALE

Browse all land that we’re selling for revenue to fund additional affordable housing. Most of these are small pieces of land right next to another property.
